summary: Outline generation produced only 1 empty card (just number '1'). No warning text appeared in the title field. Build #13 removed error:true but the done:true-only SSE still fails to deliver warning content to Gamma's outline parser.

outline_analysis.card_content: Empty - only shows number '1' with no title or description

observations.build_13_vs_12: Build #12 had error:true which caused Gamma parsing to abort with empty outline. Build #13 removed error:true, but result is identical — outline still shows only 1 empty card.
observations.done_true_effect: done:true alone does not cause Gamma to render the title field content as an outline card title. The SSE event:generation with done:true terminates the stream but the title payload is not parsed into the outline UI.
observations.strategy_assessment: Strategy 'event:generation SSE with done:true only, title carries warning' is not effective. Gamma needs the outline data in a different SSE format to render cards.
